title: Successful registration redirects to app workspace
description: Verifies a new user can register with name, email, and password and is redirected into the authenticated app experience.

steps.description: Type "Test User" into the name field
Click the Register button to submit

title: Registration shows loading state during submit
description: Verifies the UI shows an in-progress/loading state after submitting the registration form.

steps.description: Type "Loading State User" into the name field
Click the Register button to submit

title: Invalid email format blocks registration and stays on register page
description: Verifies client-side/server-side validation shows an error for an invalid email and does not leave the register page.

steps.description: Type "Invalid Email User" into the name field
Click the Register button to submit

title: Missing name shows validation error and prevents submit success
description: Verifies the name field is required (or validated) and an error appears when it is left blank.

steps.description: Click the Register button to submit

title: Missing email shows validation error and remains on register page
description: Verifies registration cannot proceed without an email and the user remains on the registration page with an error displayed.

steps.description: Type "No Email User" into the name field
Click the Register button to submit

title: Missing password shows validation error and remains on register page
description: Verifies registration cannot proceed without a password and an error is shown without navigating away.

steps.description: Type "No Password User" into the name field
Click the Register button to submit

title: Duplicate email registration shows an error and does not redirect
description: Verifies attempting to register with the same email twice results in an error and the user stays on the registration page.

steps.description: Type "First Duplicate User" into the name field
Click the Register button to submit

title: Email/password login succeeds and lands in the main workspace
description: Verifies a user can log in with valid credentials and is redirected to the /app workspace.

steps.description: Click the Login button to submit

title: Invalid password shows an error and stays on login page
description: Verifies an incorrect password produces a visible error message and does not redirect away from /login.

steps.description: Click the Login button to submit

title: Login validation: submitting with empty email shows a visible validation message
description: Verifies the login form prevents submission when the email field is empty and shows a visible validation cue.

steps.description: Click the Login button to submit

title: Login validation: submitting with empty password shows a visible validation message
description: Verifies the login form prevents submission when the password field is empty and shows a visible validation cue.

steps.description: Click the Login button to submit

title: Password masking: password field hides typed characters
description: Verifies the password input is visually masked while typing to protect the user’s password.

title: Navigate from Login to Register page
description: Verifies the user can reach the registration page from the login page via a visible link.

title: Navigate from Login to Forgot Password page
description: Verifies the user can reach the forgot-password page from the login page via a visible link.

title: Submit forgot-password request with a valid email shows confirmation
description: Verifies that submitting the forgot password form with a valid email results in a visible confirmation message.

steps.description: Verify text "Check your email" is visible

title: Submit forgot-password request with an unknown email shows error
description: Verifies that submitting the forgot password form with an unknown email shows a visible error message.

title: Forgot-password form blocks submission when email is empty
description: Verifies that the user cannot submit the form without entering an email and sees a visible validation message.

title: Forgot-password form rejects an invalid email format
description: Verifies that entering an invalid email format triggers a visible validation error and does not show a success confirmation.

steps.description: Verify text "Check your email" is not visible

title: Forgot-password page provides a visible path back to Login
description: Verifies the forgot password page includes a visible Login navigation option and that it leads to the login page.

title: Resubmitting forgot-password after an error can succeed
description: Verifies the user can recover from an error state by entering a different email and receiving a confirmation message.

steps.description: Verify text "Check your email" is visible

title: Forgot-password submit shows in-progress feedback and prevents duplicate submits
description: Verifies that after clicking submit, the UI shows visible in-progress feedback or disables repeated submission to prevent duplicates.

steps.description: Verify text "Check your email" is visible

title: Reset password successfully with a valid token and matching passwords
description: Verifies a user can reset their password with a valid token and is redirected to the login page after success.

steps.description: Navigate to "/reset-password/:token" using a valid reset token URL provided by the test environment.
Type "NewPassw0rd!" into the new password input field.
Type "NewPassw0rd!" into the confirm password input field.
Verify text indicating a successful password reset is visible.

title: Show error when confirm password does not match
description: Verifies the form blocks submission and shows a mismatch error when passwords differ.

steps.description: Navigate to "/reset-password/:token" using a valid reset token URL provided by the test environment.
Type "NewPassw0rd!" into the new password input field.
Type "DifferentPassw0rd!" into the confirm password input field.
Verify text about passwords not matching is visible.

title: Show error when reset token is expired or invalid
description: Verifies the page shows a clear error message when the reset token is expired or invalid.

steps.description: Navigate to "/reset-password/:token" using an expired or invalid reset token URL provided by the test environment.
Verify text indicating the token is invalid or expired is visible.

title: Prevent reset when new password field is empty
description: Verifies the user cannot reset the password if the new password field is left blank.

steps.description: Navigate to "/reset-password/:token" using a valid reset token URL provided by the test environment.
Type "NewPassw0rd!" into the confirm password input field.
Verify text indicating the new password is required is visible.

title: Prevent reset when confirm password field is empty
description: Verifies the user cannot reset the password if the confirm password field is left blank.

steps.description: Navigate to "/reset-password/:token" using a valid reset token URL provided by the test environment.
Type "NewPassw0rd!" into the new password input field.
Verify text indicating the confirm password is required is visible.

title: Show password policy/strength validation error for weak password
description: Verifies the UI shows an error when the new password does not meet password requirements (if enforced).

steps.description: Navigate to "/reset-password/:token" using a valid reset token URL provided by the test environment.
Type "123" into the new password input field.
Type "123" into the confirm password input field.
Verify text indicating the password is too weak or does not meet requirements is visible.

title: After successful reset, user can log in with the new password
description: Verifies end-to-end that a successfully reset password is accepted on the login page.

steps.description: Navigate to "/reset-password/:token" using a valid reset token URL provided by the test environment.
Type "NewPassw0rd!" into the new password input field.
Type "NewPassw0rd!" into the confirm password input field.

title: Generate a roadmap with all preferences selected (happy path)
description: Verifies a user can generate a roadmap from a goal with selected preferences and see nodes appear on the canvas.

steps.description: Type "Become a frontend developer with React" into the learning goal input field
Select "beginner" as the skill level preference

title: Generate a roadmap using intermediate skill level and moderate intensity
description: Verifies generation works with different preference selections and still renders a roadmap on the canvas.

steps.description: Type "Prepare for a full-stack interview focusing on TypeScript" into the learning goal input field
Select "intermediate" as the skill level preference

title: Generate a roadmap with advanced level and intensive pace for a certification goal
description: Verifies generation works for advanced/intensive preferences and a certification goal type.

steps.description: Type "Pass the AWS Solutions Architect Associate certification" into the learning goal input field
Select "advanced" as the skill level preference

title: Generate a roadmap with practice learning style for a project goal
description: Verifies generation supports practice-focused learning style and a project-oriented goal type.

steps.description: Type "Build a personal finance tracker web app" into the learning goal input field

title: Loading state is shown while generating a roadmap
description: Verifies the UI shows a visible loading state during roadmap generation before results are shown.

steps.description: Type "Learn data structures and algorithms for coding interviews" into the learning goal input field

title: Reject disallowed or unsafe content in learning goal
description: Verifies the generator shows an error/rejection message for disallowed content and keeps the user on the generator UI.

steps.description: Type "How to make a weapon at home" into the learning goal input field

title: Handle ambiguous learning goal with visible error or rejection message
description: Verifies the generator responds gracefully to an ambiguous goal by showing an error/help message and staying on the generator UI.

steps.description: Type "Teach me everything" into the learning goal input field

title: Prevent generation when the learning goal is empty
description: Verifies the UI blocks generation with an empty goal and shows a visible validation message.

title: Undo and redo reflect recent canvas changes
description: Verifies undo and redo controls work after a visible canvas change is made.

steps.description: Click on a node to select it

title: Auto-save error shows toast with retry option after an edit
description: Verifies an API save error during auto-save results in a visible error toast and a retry option.

steps.description: Click on a node to select it
Wait for an auto-save error toast to appear

title: Retry from save error toast can be initiated
description: Verifies the user can initiate a retry from the save error toast when auto-save fails.

steps.description: Click on a node to select it
Wait for an auto-save error toast to appear
Click on the "Retry" option in the toast

title: Open node detail panel from the canvas
description: Verifies a user can open the node detail panel by selecting a roadmap node in the /app workspace.

steps.description: Click on a roadmap node to open detail panel

title: Resources tab shows resource cards with type tags
description: Verifies Resources tab displays resource cards and each card shows a visible type tag.

steps.description: Click on a roadmap node to open detail panel

title: Notes tab allows typing notes and shows auto-save indicator
description: Verifies user can enter notes for a node and sees an auto-save/saved indicator after typing.

steps.description: Click on a roadmap node to open detail panel
Type "These are test notes for this node." into the notes editor field

title: Notes persist when closing and reopening the same node detail panel
description: Verifies notes remain visible after closing the detail panel and reopening the same node.

steps.description: Click on a roadmap node to open detail panel
Type "Persistence check note." into the notes editor field
Click on the same roadmap node to open detail panel
Verify text "Persistence check note." is visible

title: Quiz tab Start Quiz loads quiz UI when available
description: Verifies that starting a quiz from the Quiz tab loads the quiz UI when the node is eligible.

steps.description: Click on a roadmap node to open detail panel

title: Quiz tab shows locked state when prerequisites are not met
description: Verifies Quiz tab communicates a locked state (and does not start) when prerequisites are missing for the selected node.

steps.description: Click on a roadmap node to open detail panel

title: Switch between detail panel tabs without losing panel context
description: Verifies user can switch among Resources, AI Tutor, Notes, and Quiz tabs and each tab header remains accessible while the panel stays open.

steps.description: Click on a roadmap node to open detail panel

title: Mark node as completed from detail panel
description: Verifies the user can mark a node as completed and sees a visible completion confirmation on the UI.

steps.description: Click on a roadmap node to open detail panel

title: Pass a node quiz and receive XP reward
description: Verifies a user can start a node quiz, submit answers before the timer ends, see pass status, and see the +100 XP reward.

steps.description: Click on a roadmap node on the canvas to open its detail panel
Click the Start Quiz button in the node detail panel

title: Submit quiz before timer ends and view results screen
description: Verifies the quiz can be completed and submitted before timeout and that the results page shows score and pass/fail.

steps.description: Click on a roadmap node on the canvas to open its detail panel
Click the Start Quiz button in the node detail panel
Click an answer option for the current question

title: Fail a quiz and verify no XP reward is shown
description: Verifies that when the quiz result is fail, the UI reflects fail status and does not show a +100 XP reward message.

steps.description: Click on a roadmap node on the canvas to open its detail panel
Click the Start Quiz button in the node detail panel
Click an answer option for the current question

title: Quiz timeout shows timeout message
description: Verifies that letting the quiz timer expire without submission results in a visible timeout message.

steps.description: Click on a roadmap node on the canvas to open its detail panel
Click the Start Quiz button in the node detail panel
Wait for the quiz timer to expire

title: After timeout, user can retry the quiz
description: Verifies that after a timeout, the UI provides a retry option and restarting shows the quiz again.

steps.description: Click on a roadmap node on the canvas to open its detail panel
Click the Start Quiz button in the node detail panel
Wait for the quiz timer to expire

title: Quiz results show pass state and XP reward text when passing
description: Verifies that the results UI explicitly shows pass status and the +100 XP reward when the quiz is passed.

steps.description: Click on a roadmap node on the canvas to open its detail panel
Click the Start Quiz button in the node detail panel
Click an answer option for the current question

title: Attempt to submit without selecting an answer shows a visible validation message
description: Verifies the quiz prevents submission when no option is selected and shows a visible prompt/error.

steps.description: Click on a roadmap node on the canvas to open its detail panel
Click the Start Quiz button in the node detail panel

title: Project-scoped AI Tutor chat: send question and see markdown response
description: Verifies a user can open the AI Tutor, send a question, and see an AI response rendered as readable markdown.

steps.description: Click on the "AI Tutor" tab in the project chat area
Type "Explain the difference between REST and GraphQL with examples." into the chat input
Verify text "REST" is visible in the AI response area
Verify element "AI response message" is visible

title: Node-scoped AI Tutor chat: open from node details and send a question
description: Verifies a user can open a node’s details, switch to its AI Tutor chat, and receive a response scoped to that node.

steps.description: Click on a visible node on the roadmap canvas
Verify element "Node details panel" is visible
Click the "AI Tutor" tab within the node details panel
Type "Summarize the key concepts for this topic in 5 bullet points." into the chat input
Verify text "•" is visible in the AI response area

title: Chat history persists within the session after sending messages
description: Verifies previously sent messages remain visible when leaving and returning to the AI Tutor tab.

steps.description: Click on the "AI Tutor" tab in the project chat area
Type "What is a closure in JavaScript?" into the chat input
Verify text "What is a closure in JavaScript?" is visible in the chat history
Click on the "Notes" tab (or another non-chat tab) in the same side panel
Click on the "AI Tutor" tab in the project chat area
Verify text "What is a closure in JavaScript?" is visible in the chat history

title: Like an AI response and see feedback confirmation
description: Verifies a user can like an AI response and receives a visible confirmation that feedback was recorded.

steps.description: Click on the "AI Tutor" tab in the project chat area
Type "Give me a concise explanation of event bubbling." into the chat input
Verify element "Like" is visible on the latest AI response message
Click the "Like" control on the latest AI response message

title: Dislike an AI response and verify state changes visibly
description: Verifies a user can dislike an AI response and the UI indicates the feedback action was applied.

steps.description: Click on the "AI Tutor" tab in the project chat area
Type "Explain recursion in one paragraph." into the chat input
Verify element "Dislike" is visible on the latest AI response message
Click the "Dislike" control on the latest AI response message

title: Auto-save notes persist when switching between nodes
description: Verifies that per-node notes auto-save and are still present after switching to another node and returning.

steps.description: Click on a visible roadmap node in the canvas to open its detail panel
Click on the "Notes" tab in the node detail panel
Type "Auto-save note A - persistence check" into the notes editor
Verify an auto-save indicator is visible (e.g., "Saving" or "Saved")
Click on a different visible roadmap node in the canvas
Click on the "Notes" tab in the node detail panel
Type "Auto-save note B" into the notes editor
Verify an auto-save indicator is visible (e.g., "Saving" or "Saved")
Click back on the first roadmap node in the canvas
Click on the "Notes" tab in the node detail panel
Verify text "Auto-save note A - persistence check" is visible in the notes editor

title: Auto-save shows progress state while typing notes
description: Verifies the UI shows a saving/saved state after notes are edited.

steps.description: Click on a visible roadmap node in the canvas to open its detail panel
Click on the "Notes" tab in the node detail panel
Type "Typing to trigger auto-save state" into the notes editor
Verify an auto-save indicator is visible (e.g., "Saving" or "Saved")

title: Notes remain saved after reopening the detail panel for the same node
description: Verifies that closing and reopening the same node detail panel retains the saved notes content.

steps.description: Click on a visible roadmap node in the canvas to open its detail panel
Click on the "Notes" tab in the node detail panel
Type "Reopen panel persistence note" into the notes editor
Verify an auto-save indicator is visible (e.g., "Saving" or "Saved")
Click on a different visible roadmap node in the canvas
Click back on the original roadmap node in the canvas
Click on the "Notes" tab in the node detail panel
Verify text "Reopen panel persistence note" is visible in the notes editor

title: Notes can be cleared and the cleared state persists for that node
description: Verifies that deleting notes content triggers auto-save and the node shows empty notes when revisited.

steps.description: Click on a visible roadmap node in the canvas to open its detail panel
Click on the "Notes" tab in the node detail panel
Type "This note will be cleared" into the notes editor
Verify an auto-save indicator is visible (e.g., "Saving" or "Saved")
Press "Escape" to close the node detail panel (if supported)
Click on the same roadmap node again to reopen its detail panel
Click on the "Notes" tab in the node detail panel
Press "Backspace" in the notes editor to remove content until empty
Verify an auto-save indicator is visible (e.g., "Saving" or "Saved")
Click on a different visible roadmap node in the canvas
Click back on the original roadmap node in the canvas
Click on the "Notes" tab in the node detail panel
Verify text "This note will be cleared" is not visible in the notes editor

title: View profile overview: XP, level, streaks, learning minutes, quiz stats, badges, and completed topics are visible
description: Verifies the authenticated user can open the Profile page and see all core gamification/stat sections rendered.

steps.description: Click on "Profile" in the app navigation

title: Profile streak section: current streak and longest streak are displayed
description: Verifies the Profile page shows both current and longest streak values/labels.

steps.description: Click on "Profile" in the app navigation

title: Profile learning time: learning minutes section is visible
description: Verifies the learning minutes/learning time stat is shown on the Profile page for an authenticated user.

steps.description: Click on "Profile" in the app navigation

title: Profile quiz statistics section is visible
description: Verifies the Profile page displays quiz statistics for the authenticated user.

steps.description: Click on "Profile" in the app navigation

title: Profile achievements: badges section is visible
description: Verifies the Profile page displays a badges/achievements area for the authenticated user.

steps.description: Click on "Profile" in the app navigation

title: Profile progress: completed topics/roadmaps section is visible
description: Verifies the Profile page displays completed topics (and/or completed roadmaps) information.

steps.description: Click on "Profile" in the app navigation

title: Toggle roadmap from public back to private and confirm state reflects private
description: Verifies a user can revert a previously public roadmap to private and the UI reflects the private state.

steps.description: Click on the "Public" toggle to set the roadmap to private

title: Update appearance and editor preferences from Settings (theme + AI panel)
description: Verifies a logged-in user can change theme and an editor preference on the Settings page and sees the UI reflect the changes.

steps.description: Click the "Settings" link in the app navigation

title: Change language preference from Settings and see UI update
description: Verifies a logged-in user can change language preference and sees visible UI text update accordingly.

steps.description: Click the "Language" link in the app navigation

title: Navigate from Settings to Language page via in-page control
description: Verifies a logged-in user can reach the Language preference page from Settings using a visible navigation control.

steps.description: Click the "Settings" link in the app navigation

title: Theme toggle persists across navigation to Profile and back to Settings
description: Verifies that after changing theme in Settings, the selected theme remains applied when navigating to another page and returning.

steps.description: Click the "Settings" link in the app navigation
Click the "Profile" link in the app navigation
Click the "Settings" link in the app navigation

title: Change language to Indonesian and back to English
description: Verifies a logged-in user can switch language preferences between Indonesian and English and sees visible UI labels change each time.

steps.description: Click the "Language" link in the app navigation

title: Landing page core sections are visible and ordered content can be browsed
description: Verifies a visitor can load the landing page and see the hero, features, pricing, and FAQ sections.

title: Get Started CTA navigates to Register page
description: Verifies the primary call-to-action on the landing page takes the user to the registration route.

title: Browse features section content is accessible via scrolling
description: Verifies the user can reach the features section and see feature-related content on the landing page.

title: Pricing section is visible and plan information is presented
description: Verifies the pricing section can be reached and displays plan-related information.

title: FAQ section is readable and at least one question is visible
description: Verifies the user can reach the FAQ section and read FAQ content.

title: Switch language to Indonesian updates landing page UI text
description: Verifies selecting Indonesian from the language switch changes visible UI text on the landing page.

steps.description: Click on the language switch control

title: Switch language back to English restores landing page UI text
description: Verifies switching back to English returns the landing page to English UI text.

steps.description: Click on the language switch control
Click on the language switch control

title: Language selection persists while browsing sections on the landing page
description: Verifies that after changing language, scrolling through sections continues to show the selected language text.

steps.description: Click on the language switch control

title: Billing page shows plan comparison and beta notice
description: Verifies that the Billing (Beta) page loads and clearly displays plan comparison content and a beta/no-payment notice.

title: Clicking an upgrade button shows beta limitation message (no real payment)
description: Verifies that selecting an upgrade action does not start payment and instead shows an informational beta limitation message.

steps.description: Click the primary "Upgrade" button for any paid plan
Verify text "no real payment" is visible

title: Upgrade action does not navigate away from Billing page
description: Verifies that clicking an upgrade button keeps the user on the Billing page and does not open a checkout flow.

title: Repeated upgrade clicks consistently show the same beta limitation feedback
description: Verifies that clicking an upgrade button multiple times results in consistent informational feedback (no payment processing).

steps.description: Verify text "no real payment" is visible

title: Plan comparison section is visible and readable
description: Verifies that the Billing page presents plan options in a comparison layout with visible plan names/features.

steps.description: Verify at least one "Upgrade" button is visible

title: Billing page remains accessible after navigating away and returning
description: Verifies that the Billing page can be revisited and still shows beta notice and upgrade UI.
